$jsonSchema.description: Glasses document as root entity, embedding provider data and tracking sales history inline

brand.description: Brand name of the glasses - required

graduationLeft.description: Optical graduation for the left lens - required

graduationRight.description: Optical graduation for the right lens - required

frameType.description: Type of frame material or construction - required

lensColor.description: Color or tint of the lenses - required

price.description: Retail price of the glasses - required

provider.description: Embedded provider snapshot for fast retrieval without joins - required

providerId.description: Reference to the full provider document

salesHistory.description: List of sale events for this pair of glasses (denormalized for read performance)

customerId.description: Reference to the customer who bought the glasses
